news.headline: Breezeline launches fiber internet in 8 Virginia communities with high speeds. Deploying FTTH tech for homes and businesses.
news.summary: Breezeline plans to introduce fiber-to-the-home (FTTH) technology offering high speeds. The new technology will provide internet speeds up to 1 gigabit per second. This improvement aims to enhance connectivity for customers and surpass the current internet service in terms of reliability and performance. The deployment of FTTH technology signifies a significant advancement in Breezeline's infrastructure, allowing for faster and more stable internet connections for users.

news.headline: 2025 Raise Awards open for nonprofit nominations; Recognizes fundraising innovation and storytelling.
news.summary: The 2025 Raise Awards, hosted by OneCause, a prominent digital fundraising technology provider, are now accepting nominations. This annual event based in Indianapolis aims to honor innovation, bold ideas, and impactful storytelling in the fundraising sector. This year promises to recognize outstanding individuals and organizations making a difference in the community. Nominations for the prestigious awards can be submitted starting March 20, 2025. These awards highlight those driving positive change by leveraging technology and creativity in fundraising efforts.

news.headline: Can-Fite and Vetbiolix collaborate to expedite Piclidenoson's clinical trial for canine osteoarthritis in $3.8B market. Can-Fite could earn $325M by 2029.
news.summary: Can-Fite is expected to receive $325 million through upfront payments and royalties upon regulatory approval of Piclidenoson for veterinary use. This projection spans over the next decade, assuming the product will be launched by 2029.

news.headline: Cheese sauce market to hit $9.1 billion by 2035, from $5.5 billion in 2023, growing at 4.4% CAGR, driven by food service industry demand.
news.summary: The cheese sauce market was valued at $5.5 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach $9.1 billion by 2035, with a growth rate of 4.4% from 2024 to 2035. Factors driving this growth include the expanding food service industry, where cheese sauce is increasingly used in various dishes. Quick-service restaurants like McDonald's and Taco Bell have made cheese sauce a staple in their offerings, contributing to the market demand. Consumer preferences for indulgent and flavorful meals also fuel this growth, with the U.S. fast food market valued at around $200 billion. However, the perishability of dairy products poses a challenge due to their short shelf life and vulnerability to microbial contamination, limiting distribution in regions with inadequate cold chain infrastructure.

news.headline: Syntactic Foam Market to grow at 5.2% CAGR, reaching $241.6M globally by 2033. In 2023 it was valued at $116.3M.
news.summary: The report by Allied Market Research on the "Syntactic Foams Market" indicates that the market was valued at $116.3 million in 2023 and is projected to reach $241.6 million by 2033, with a CAGR of 7.7% during the period from 2024 to 2033. The macroeconomic environment, including factors like economic growth and industrial activity, significantly affects the demand for syntactic foam in industries such as marine, aerospace, defense, and offshore oil & gas. The global economy's forecasted growth rate of 3.2% from 2024 to 2025 is expected to drive investments in marine exploration, aerospace materials, and deep-sea infrastructure, boosting the demand for high-performance materials like syntactic foam. However, economic slowdowns and geopolitical factors like trade policies and supply chain disruptions can negatively impact market growth. The report provides extensive insights into market dynamics and forecasts till 2033, catering to various sectors like transport, marine, oil and gas, aerospace, construction, and others.

news.headline: Global Endoscopic Spinal Surgery Market to hit $1.6 billion by 2035, growing at a 7.3% CAGR due to advancements and rise in adoption.
news.summary: The endoscopic spinal surgery market is projected to grow significantly, with a value of $0.7 billion in 2023 and an estimated value of $1.6 billion by 2035, at a CAGR of 7.3%. This growth is attributed to advancements in minimally invasive surgical techniques, increasing prevalence of spinal disorders, and healthcare professionals adopting endoscopic procedures more frequently. The improvements in technology like high-resolution imaging, advanced navigation systems, and robotic-assisted technologies have made endoscopic spinal surgery a preferred option over traditional open surgeries. These innovations have led to better patient outcomes, reduced complications, shorter hospital stays, faster recovery times, and minimal postoperative pain, driving the increasing preference for endoscopic spinal surgery.

news.headline: Solana ETF launch boosts SOL adoption, though inflows are limited. Two new futures ETFs by Volatility Shares to debut on March 20, promising higher liquidity. Solana's status rises amidst plans for spot ETF after inclusion in US crypto reserve. Future ETF adoption uncertain, but spot ETF could attract $3-6 billion in assets. Inflows may extend into 2026 due to SEC review process.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency industry is witnessing the launch of the first Solana futures exchange-traded fund (ETF), with Volatility Shares introducing two Solana (SOL) futures ETFs on March 20 - Volatility Shares Solana ETF (SOLZ) and Volatility Shares 2X Solana ETF (SOLT). This development is seen as a significant move towards the potential introduction of a spot Solana ETF. Industry experts believe this move could lead to increased institutional adoption for SOL, potentially narrowing the gap with Ethereum's market cap. While concerns about disappointing investor inflows persist, the legitimacy of Solana as a top cryptocurrency is being recognized, especially after Solana's inclusion in the US crypto strategic reserve alongside Cardano and XRP. A spot Solana ETF, if approved, is expected to attract between $3 billion to $6 billion in net assets in the first six months, surpassing the adoption rate of Ether ETFs. The timeline for this approval could extend into 2026, as per SEC review precedents.

news.headline: BrandingBusiness and Cireco reveal groundbreaking brand at ProMat event, redefining material handling.
news.summary: A groundbreaking company called Cireco was introduced by BrandingBusiness at the 2025 ProMat show in Irvine, California. The event, considered a premier gathering in the manufacturing and supply chain sector, showcased Cireco's revolutionary approach to material handling. This unveiling took place on March 20, 2025, and garnered significant attention within the industry. Cireco aims to redefine traditional methods with its innovative strategies, attracting interest and highlighting its potential impact on the sector.

news.headline: Liberty closed public offer of 3,031,000 Units at $1.65 each, raising $5,001,150 with Canaccord Genuity as underwriter
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia and Wilmington, Massachusetts on March 20, 2025, Liberty Defense Holdings Ltd. ("Liberty" or the "Company") (TSXV: SCAN, OTCQB: LDDFF, FRANKFURT: LD2A), a top technology provider of AI-based next-generation detection solutions for concealed weapons and threats, has successfully closed an overnight marketed public offering. The offering involved 3,031,000 units sold at $1.65 per unit, resulting in gross proceeds of $5,001,150. Canaccord Genuity Corp. served as the underwriter for the offering.

news.headline: Global Kaolin industry research report by ResearchAndMarkets.com offers insights on market trends 2019-2024 & forecasts till 2029. Vital info on suppliers, prices, end-users, etc., provided.
news.summary: Dublin - A report on the Kaolin (CAS 1332-58-7) industry has been recently added to ResearchAndMarkets.com, offering insights into the global and regional market trends from 2019 to 2024 and a forecast up to 2029. The comprehensive report covers various aspects of Kaolin, including general information, synonyms, chemical composition, safety measures, hazards, handling procedures, storage guidelines, and details on toxicity and ecological impact, as well as transportation information. This detailed analysis is a valuable tool for gaining knowledge in the sector.

news.headline: RSi named 2025 Top Workplaces USA National Award Winner and Top 100 by USA Today. Located in Columbia, S.C.
news.summary: RSi, a privately held revenue cycle management service provider catering exclusively to hospitals and healthcare systems, has received the prestigious "Top 100" USA Today award in its inaugural year. The recognition, bestowed on March 20, 2025, in Columbia, South Carolina, signifies the exceptional endorsement from RSi's employees. This achievement highlights the company's commitment to excellence and positions it among the top players in the industry.

news.headline: GigaStar Market now accepts USDC, opening up investment options for YouTube Creators; announced on March 20, 2025.
news.summary: GigaStar, a startup based in Chicago, disclosed on March 20th, 2025, that they are offering Investors the ability to use USD Coin (USDC) cryptocurrency as a payment option. This move was made in response to growing demand from investors. GigaStar specializes in connecting YouTube creators with investors, bridging the gap between the two groups. This new payment option aims to streamline the investment process and enhance accessibility for investors. By integrating USDC, GigaStar hopes to provide more flexibility to investors, adding to the digital currency's increasing popularity. This initiative reflects the company's commitment to staying abreast of market trends.

news.headline: XRP up 8.3% in 7 days, outperforming Bitcoin and Ethereum. XRP price $2.48, market cap $144.3B. Trader expects further gains.
news.summary: XRP has experienced a notable 8.3% increase in the past week, surpassing other major cryptocurrencies in performance. Currently priced at $2.48, XRP boasts a market cap of $144.3 billion, with a 24-hour trend showing a 6.9% increase and a 7-day trend of 7.9%. In comparison, Bitcoin stands at $85,242.99 with a market cap of $1.69 trillion, showing a 24-hour increase of 1.9% and a 7-day increase of 2.9%. Ethereum, at $1,992.23 and a market cap of $240.4 billion, has experienced a 24-hour decrease of 0.5% but a 7-day increase of 5.2%. Analyst CrediBULL Crypto shared insights regarding XRP, suggesting to hold spot for a potential surge into double digits, avoiding mid-range longs for now. The expectation is for some to fade the rally, presenting buying opportunities for interested traders. For the full story, reader can visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Kraken acquires NinjaTrader for $1.5B, entering US crypto futures market, aiming to expand offerings into traditional trading.
news.summary: Kraken, a cryptocurrency exchange, has announced its intention to acquire NinjaTrader, a U.S.-based retail futures trading platform, in a deal worth $1.5 billion. This strategic move aims to help Kraken enter the U.S. crypto futures market by leveraging NinjaTrader's established regulatory framework.This acquisition is significant as it signifies a trend of increasing overlap between traditional finance and the crypto industry, marking one of the largest transactions bridging these sectors. While it presents opportunities for expansion into traditional futures trading for Kraken, it also poses challenges related to regulations and operations.NinjaTrader, founded in 2003, is a registered Futures Commission Merchant (FCM) with the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) and serves approximately 2 million traders with its futures trading services. The deal could potentially open up international markets for NinjaTrader while enhancing Kraken's product offerings beyond digital assets.Overall, this acquisition represents a strategic move by Kraken to diversify its services and broaden its market reach, indicating a further convergence between traditional finance and the crypto sector.

news.headline: Molly Maid offers spring cleaning tips for National Cleaning Week in 2025. Leading residential cleaning company provides practical advice.
news.summary: A prominent residential cleaning company based in WACO, Texas, known as Molly Maid®, recently provided valuable spring cleaning advice on March 20, 2025. As the primary franchise in both residential and commercial cleaning services nationwide, Molly Maid® is offering practical tips for the upcoming seasonal cleaning tasks.

news.headline: Calendly partners with LinkedIn, enabling Premium Business users to schedule meetings via their profile.
news.summary: Atlanta-based scheduling software company Calendly has revealed a new partnership with LinkedIn, enabling Premium Business users to easily schedule and confirm meetings directly from their profile. This integration aims to streamline the process, saving time and enhancing efficiency for users.

news.headline: Texas secures $196M in bonds for Starwood Land, largest Municipal Utility District receivable financing.
news.summary: This recent financial agreement marks the largest receivable financing for a Municipal Utility District to date.

news.headline: Powell minimizes risks as Trump urges rate cut; news from 03/20.
news.summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell minimized the increasing risks to the economy during a recent meeting. Meanwhile, President Trump has urged the Fed to reduce interest rates. These contrasting positions come amidst market uncertainties. On March 20th, this issue was dominating discussions in the financial world. The exact figures for the current market rates and any potential rate cuts were not provided, but the focus was on Powell's attitude towards risks and Trump's call for rate reductions.

news.headline: SKYX schedules a corporate update call. Stay tuned for key details and important numbers.
NKF's KidneyCARE Study enrolls over 1,000 patients nationwide in one year, empowering individuals with kidney disease.
news.summary: A new KidneyCARE (Community Access to Research Equity)™ registry launched by the National Kidney Foundation (NKF) is set to empower individuals with kidney disease and enhance research efforts for improved patient outcomes. The initiative, unveiled in New York on March 20, 2025, aims to provide vital data and support to individuals battling kidney disease. This registry will streamline research processes and bolster data collection, ultimately benefiting the over 37 million Americans grappling with kidney diseases. By fostering collaboration between patients and researchers, this innovative approach seeks to drive advancements in treatment strategies and overall care for kidney disease patients.

news.headline: Breezeline expands fiber internet to St. Mary’s County, Maryland with new FTTH technology offering high speeds.
news.summary: Breezeline will be implementing fiber-to-the-home (FTTH) technology, providing high-speed internet. This new technology will offer exceptional speeds, significantly improving internet connectivity for residential users. This deployment is set to benefit a substantial number of households, ensuring faster and more reliable access to online services.

news.headline: OQ Chemicals to start heptanoic acid production in Germany, enhancing supply chain security and expanding carboxylic acid portfolio.
news.summary: Germany-based OQ Chemicals has announced plans to commence production of heptanoic acid in the country, aimed at bolstering its carboxylic acid portfolio and ensuring greater supply chain security. This initiative is expected to significantly enhance the company's operations and further solidify its standing in the industry.

news.headline: Trilliant will showcase solutions at DISTRIBUTECH International 2025 to future-proof businesses, held in Dallas from March 25-27.
news.summary: Trilliant, a company based in Cary, North Carolina, will be taking part in DISTRIBUTECH International 2025 in Dallas from March 25 to 27. Trilliant will be showcasing its Power of Choice value proposition during this event.

news.headline: Pompeian® named 2025 USA Today Top Workplace; America's top olive oil brand recognized for employee satisfaction.
news.summary: In Baltimore, Pompeian®, Inc., a farmer-owned organization and leading olive oil brand in America, has been honored as a recipient of the 2025 USA Today Top Workplaces award. This recognition highlights companies that prioritize a people-centric environment and offer exceptional employee experiences. The accolade is determined through feedback from an annual survey conducted by USA TODAY and workplace insights leader, Energage. Selection for the award is based solely on employee responses. Congratulations to Pompeian®, Inc. on this achievement.

news.headline: Auquan introduces AI Agent, designed for risk monitoring in financial services, providing teams with improved risk visibility.
news.summary: A company with operations in London and New York, Auquan, has introduced a new tool called Risk Agent, which aims to offer improved risk visibility and situational awareness for investment and credit teams. This tool is designed to help these teams detect potential issues as they arise.

news.headline: Ripple relieved as SEC drops appeal against firm, but crypto regulations still unclear. XRP price rose 9% post-announcement. #SEC #crypto #XRP
news.summary: Ripple is celebrating the SEC's decision not to pursue a court case against them, providing uncertain legal clarity for the crypto industry. The US regulator dropped an appeal against Ripple, with CEO Brad Garlinghouse stating it offers certainty for Ripple but loose ends remain to be addressed. Ripple's Chief Legal Officer expressed moving forward stronger and setting a precedent for the crypto industry. The Ripple announcement led to a 9% XRP price spike, but legal experts note it won't have a significant impact on the broader crypto industry. Lawyer Aaron Brogan highlighted that the case doesn't set a legal precedent while Brian Grace emphasized the need for Congress to legislate changes for the industry. Garlinghouse alluded to potentially launching a cross-appeal, and the firm faces challenges like a $125 million fine and fundraising restrictions. Despite the SEC decision, legal battles may continue, and congressional efforts for a cryptocurrency framework are ongoing. The stablecoin bill progress is expected in a few months, though the FIT 21 bill failed previously. Lawmakers aim to pass both bills by August, with potential finalization by year-end.

news.headline: Vantage Drilling Intl. reported net gain of $55.5M in Q4 2024, compared to net loss of $14.6M in Q4 2023.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, Vantage Drilling International Ltd. announced a notable financial performance for the three months ended December 31, 2024. The company reported a significant increase in net gain attributable to shareholders, reaching approximately $55.5 million equating to $4.17 per diluted share. This marks a substantial improvement compared to the same period in 2023 when the company experienced a net loss attributable to shareholders of about $14.6 million or $1.10 per diluted share. The positive financial growth showcases Vantage’s progress and rising profitability.

news.headline: H World Group's financial results show strong growth with 7.8% increase in Q4 revenue to RMB6.0 billion and 9.2% increase in 2024 revenue to RMB23.9 billion.
news.summary: The impressive growth trajectory of the company is supported by rapid network expansion, increasing revenue without heavy asset investment, and a growing membership base, all indicating sustained momentum in the long term. Key points from the latest report show a 7.8% year-on-year increase in fourth quarter revenue, amounting to RMB6.0 billion (equivalent to US$825 million). Looking at the full year, revenue for 2024 rose by 9.2% year-on-year to RMB23.9 billion.

news.headline: CPSC announces Tzumi Electronics recall of FitRx SmartBell XL Dumbbells due to impact injury risk. View at www.cpsc.gov.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, the Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) revealed recalls in collaboration with various firms. The Tzumi Electronics company is recalling FitRx SmartBell XL Quick-Select Adjustable Dumbbells due to the risk of impact injury. For more details on the recalls, the public is encouraged to visit www.cpsc.gov.

news.headline: PBS to air two-hour special celebrating 50 years of Austin City Limits on April 4, 2025. Features various artists.
news.summary: A special Primetime event marking the 50th anniversary will air on PBS on April 4, 2025, lasting two hours. The lineup includes prominent artists such as Chris Stapleton, Gary Clark Jr., Billy Strings, Leon Bridges, Lyle Lovett, Shawn Colvin, Indigo Girls, Brandy Clark, Cam, Rufus Wainwright, The Mavericks, Ángela Aguilar, and Eve Monsees.

news.headline: QNB Corp. moves from Pink market to OTCQX Best Market, parent company of QNB Bank. Quakertown, PA. OT with symbol QNBC.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Quakertown, Pennsylvania, QNB Corp., the parent company of QNB Bank, revealed its qualification to trade on the OTCQX® Best Market, under the ticker symbol QNBC. Formerly trading on the Pink® market, the company's move to the OTCQX signifies an upgrade in its trading status, reflecting increased stature and credibility in the market. This adjustment is poised to offer enhanced visibility and accessibility to investors, elevating QNB Corp.'s standing in the financial sector.

news.headline: Truist (NYSE: TFC) will report Q1 2025 earnings on April 17, 2025, with Chairman Bill Rogers and CFO Mike Maguire.
news.summary: Charlotte, North Carolina, March 20, 2025 - Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) is set to announce its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on April 17, 2025, before the market opens. Chairman and CEO Bill Rogers, along with CFO Mike Maguire, will be responsible for presenting the results. Investors and stakeholders can expect important insights into the corporation's financial status on this date.

news.headline: DICK'S Sporting Goods partners with IShowSpeed, Tom Brady, Kevin Durant, Suni Lee, and Travis Hunter for new footwear campaign. #NYE: DKS
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 20, 2025, DICK'S Sporting Goods (NYSE: DKS) unveiled a fresh footwear advertising initiative named Speed Shopping. The campaign highlights DICK'S as the go-to spot for athletes' footwear requirements, displaying a wide range of performance and lifestyle sneakers.

news.headline: March 20, 2025: Orion Corporation discloses BlackRock, Inc. as a major shareholder in accordance with Securities Market Act.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, at 15:30 EET, Orion Corporation released important information regarding major shareholder announcements. This update pertains to significant changes in ownership and investments within the company. Please refer to the latest stock exchange release for further details and specific numbers related to these developments.

news.headline: Trump pressures Fed to cut rates on 'Liberation Day in America' amid rising uncertainty. Fed keeps rates at 4.25%-4.50%. Tariffs expected to ease. Fed urged to "do the right thing." Read more on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: President Donald Trump wasted no time in urging the Federal Reserve to lower interest rates, dubbing Apr. 2 as “Liberation Day in America” when reciprocal tariffs take effect. The Fed, on the other hand, signaled heightened economic uncertainty, slashing growth forecasts and boosting inflation expectations. Following the Federal Open Market Committee's decision to maintain interest rates at 4.25%-4.50%, Trump took to his Truth Social platform, pressing the Central Bank to “do the right” thing by cutting rates amidst the transitioning tariffs. Trump justified the call for lower borrowing costs by pointing out how tariffs would move through the economy. He emphasized the necessity for the Fed to cut rates in the wake of the changing economic landscape.

news.headline: US drone surveying market to reach $2.54 billion by 2033, double-digit growth predicted. Technology improvements driving industry advancements.
news.summary: In Palm Beach, Florida, as of March 20, 2025, the drone sector has been experiencing significant advancements in technology. There have been numerous notable developments in the uses and functionality of drones, leading to a surge in the market. The industry has seen substantial growth, with a notable increase in sales and adoption rates.

news.headline: MOO Imbalance
Inspiren revolutionizes senior living with $35M Series A funding, AI technology for better care, safety, and efficiency.
news.summary: With a substantial $35 million injection from its Series A funding, Inspiren is revolutionizing care planning, bolstering resident safety, optimizing emergency response, and streamlining staff workflows in the senior care sector. Based in New York, this innovative company is at the forefront of utilizing AI technology to enhance operations in this critical industry.

news.headline: AZmed partners with UP centre and Radiologie Dix30 in Canada to advance pediatric and emergency radiology with AI innovation.
news.summary: In Paris on March 20, 2025, AZmed revealed a significant collaboration with UP Centre for Pediatric Emergencies and Radiologie Dix30, enhancing their position in the Canadian healthcare sector with cutting-edge AI technology. This partnership elevates the two centers to the forefront of innovation, with the introduction of AZtrauma, an AI-powered system designed to revolutionize emergency medical treatment.

news.headline: Banuba in Dubai improves AI makeup recommendations with seasonal color analysis in TINT Virtual Try-On Platform.
news.summary: In Dubai, United Arab Emirates, Banuba has enhanced its automated seasonal color analysis and AI makeup recommendations, improving both accuracy and speed. This advancement is set to benefit a larger number of users, making the process more efficient and precise.

news.headline: LookDeep Health releases AI study in Frontiers in Imaging, highlighting model training and architecture.
news.summary: LookDeep Health, a tech company based in Oakland, California, has recently released a detailed peer-reviewed paper in Frontiers in Imaging. The paper showcases their innovative use of AI and computer vision technology to enhance patient care in hospital settings. The study focuses on key aspects such as model training, architectural selection, and the practical implementation of artificial intelligence. It delves into how these technologies are making a significant impact, highlighting both the strengths and obstacles faced in real-world scenarios. This development signifies a significant step forward in leveraging AI to advance healthcare practices.

news.headline: Reltio & Alation integrate for AI & data management, improving governance & quality. Simplifies for enterprise AI initiatives.
news.summary: In Redwood Shores, California, a company called Reltio® unveiled Reltio Integration with Alation, a significant move in the field of AI-powered data unification and management. This partnership offers customers a reliable, unified data foundation essential for powering AI solutions, along with streamlined data governance and superior data quality. Many enterprises are focusing on AI initiatives, but challenges such as insufficient data quality, inconsistent business language, and inadequate governance can hinder their effectiveness. This integration aims to address these obstacles and enhance the AI capabilities of organizations.

news.headline: RLTYco launches "Agent Brew" podcast hosted by Eric Zollinger, post-$20M Series A funding for nationwide expansion.
news.summary: In New York, RLTYco, a full-service provider for real estate professionals, has unveiled its latest podcast, "Agent Brew," hosted by industry expert Eric Zollinger. The podcast launch aligns with RLTYco's successful $20 million Series A funding led by Altriarch. This funding boost will support the company's nationwide service expansion. "Agent Brew" aims to offer real estate professionals crucial insights, strategies, and industry updates to enhance their knowledge and expertise.

news.headline: WellTheory and IBI release report on impact of autoimmune disease on US employees, 50 million affected, focuses on health and productivity.
news.summary: In Atherton, California, WellTheory, a unique virtual platform for those struggling with autoimmune disease, has launched a revolutionary Autoimmune Disease Impact Report in collaboration with the Integrated Benefits Institute (IBI). This report delves into the challenges faced by the 50 million Americans affected by autoimmune diseases, offering insights and data-driven solutions. The IBI, a nonprofit organization dedicated to enhancing the quality of employee health and productivity initiatives, partnered with WellTheory to produce this comprehensive report, shedding light on the impact of autoimmune diseases on individuals and the workforce as a whole.

news.headline: XR and Scope3 partner to reduce carbon footprint in digital ads; integration to measure carbon emissions data.
news.summary: A reputable global technology company, XR, has recently revealed a strategic collaboration with Scope3, a prominent entity specializing in reducing carbon footprints within media and advertising sectors. The partnership aims to incorporate cutting-edge carbon emissions data directly into XR's platform. Such integration will empower brands to effectively gauge, oversee, and diminish the carbon footprint associated with their digital advertisements. This move will embed sustainability within the creative distribution process, fostering ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) performance, and enhancing customer value. It is noteworthy that digital and streaming advertising play a significant role in contributing to carbon emissions.

news.headline: Sagard Real Estate buys Grande Oaks in Roswell, GA, adding 270 units to its portfolio in the Southeast.
news.summary: Sagard Real Estate, a prominent real estate investment firm, has just revealed its purchase of Grande Oaks, a garden-style apartment complex in Roswell, Georgia consisting of 270 units. This acquisition bolsters Sagard Real Estate’s presence in the Southeast region, underscoring its pledge to invest in well-positioned properties with significant growth opportunities and lasting value. Grande Oaks, constructed in 1996, occupies a substantial area of over 311,000 rentable square feet.

news.headline: RLJ Lodging Trust's Chief Financial Officer, Sean Mahoney, is retiring in May after 7 years, with over 30 years of experience.
news.summary: RLJ Lodging Trust, based in Bethesda, Md., disclosed that its Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, Sean M. Mahoney, will retire in May of this year after seven years with the company. Mahoney's retirement comes after a successful career of over 30 years, with over 20 years in the hospitality Real Estate Investment Trust industry. The Company, listed on the NYSE as RLJ, expressed gratitude to Mahoney for his significant contributions during his time with the company.

news.headline: OMNY Health integrates 4 billion unstructured clinical notes for advanced healthcare research insights.
news.summary: OMNY Health, a prominent healthcare ecosystem specializing in compliant real-world data insights, has revealed the incorporation of a substantial 4 billion unstructured clinical notes into its network. Through partnerships with various provider organizations such as academic medical centers and integrated delivery networks, OMNY Health has successfully repurposed these once inaccessible data points into valuable research insights. This strategic initiative aims to tackle the persistent issue of leveraging the significance of clinician notes for research purposes.

news.headline: AtScale's 2025 Semantic Layer Summit on May 28 in Boston details keynote lineup and registration.
news.summary: A virtual event called the 2025 Semantic Layer Summit will take place on May 28, organized by AtScale in Boston. The summit aims to showcase advancements in the semantic layer and GenAI capabilities, with industry experts leading the discussions.

news.headline: Balfour Beatty Communities' Aspire at West Campus and Oktiv recognized among Top 100 Student Housing Properties by J Turner Research.
news.summary: A national real estate investment and management company, Balfour Beatty Communities, based in Malvern, PA, celebrates the recognition of two of its student housing properties. Aspire at West Campus in Iowa City, IA, and Oktiv in Tallahassee, FL, were both honored in the Top 100 Student Housing Properties in the Nation for their exceptional online reputation by J Turner Research. Aspire at West Campus, situated at the University of Iowa campus, features one- and two-bedroom apartment homes and has garnered significant attention for its outstanding reputation.
